title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
